strategyResults.details: sprint.test.ts 4/4; plan + contract-materialization + run green; 6 cockpit pre-existing.

criteriaResults.evidence: sprint.ts:130 filter c.specId===spec.specId before findNextPendingSprint; two-spec test green.

Guard works (returns before generator, logs questions) BUT sprint.ts:123 references 'npx agent-bober plan-answer' (hyphen) which does not exist; canonical is 'npx agent-bober plan answer' (space) per cli/index.ts:137 and plan.ts:219.
criteriaResults.feedback: Change sprint.ts:123 to use 'npx agent-bober plan answer <specId> <questionId> "<answer>"' (space, not hyphen). Add a test assertion (spy on console.info) that the refusal message contains 'plan answer'.

criteriaResults.evidence: sprint.ts:133-135 mentions plan + run; test green.

generatorFeedback.expected: Use 'npx agent-bober plan answer <specId> <questionId> "<answer>"'; add a console.info assertion in the S3-C3 test.

summary: 4/5 pass. specId filtering, empty-message, single-spec flow all correct. S3-C3 fails: refusal message points to non-existent 'plan-answer' (hyphen); must be 'plan answer' (space). One-line fix + test assertion.
